View More About Us Maiya Hospital, established in 1979, was founded with the mission and vision of providing affordable and accessible patient care to the people of South Bangalore Today, it stands as a trusted 100-bed multi-speciality facility offering comprehensive healthcare services. Our hospital also provides cashless insurance treatment, ensuring quality care is within reach for every patient. Our Mission We understand that accessing quality medical care can sometimes be challenging — especially for individuals with limited resources, mobility, or busy schedules. At Maiya Hospital, we are committed to removing those barriers by providing affordable, compassionate, and world-class healthcare to every patient who walks through our doors. Your Health Is Our Top Goal We Understand and Know Your Needs. At Maiya Hospital, our experienced medical professionals use state-of-the-art equipment and evidence-based practices to diagnose and treat a wide range of conditions — ensuring the best possible outcomes for every patient. Why Choose Us Modern Equipment Maiya Hospital is equipped with advanced diagnostic and surgical technology, including Digital X-Ray, Modular OTs, ICU life support, and a fully equipped diagnostic laboratory Highly Qualified Doctors Our team of 50+ experienced specialists brings decades of expertise across Radiology, Paediatrics, Obstetrics, Gynaecology, Anaesthesia, and more. Leading Medical Facility for You and Your Family’s Health Care Our multi-speciality team provides comprehensive care for children, adults, and seniors. From preventive health check-ups and well-woman care to complex surgical procedures and critical care — Maiya Hospital is your trusted healthcare partner in South Bangalore A friendly team you can call on anytime We accept cashless treatment from 15+ leading insurance partners ISO 9001 Certified and NABH Accredited for quality assurance Our Commitment Successful Treatment Our Medical Services Our goal is to be lifelong partners in the health and wellbeing of your family. With 46+ years of trusted healthcare, Maiya Hospital has touched millions of lives across South Bangalore and beyond. Explore All Medical Services People who are Always Dedicated to Your Health Meet Our Expert Doctors at Maiya Hospital Our team of highly qualified medical professionals is dedicated to providing you with the best possible care.
